text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 209 

LINE_ICD_DGNS_VRSN_CD 

LABEL: Line Diagnosis Code Diagnosis Version Code (ICD-9 or ICD-10) 

DESCRIPTION: Effective with version “J,” the code used to indicate if the diagnosis code is ICD-9/ICD-10. 

SHORT NAME: LINE_ICD_DGNS_VRSN_CD 

LONG NAME: LINE_ICD_DGNS_VRSN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: Blank = ICD-9 
9 = ICD-9 
0 = ICD-10 

COMMENT: On
